# Current synthesis

The sample team plans weekly, reviews documentation changes before release, and keeps source material linked from the synthesized pages.

# Workflow

1. Capture source material.
2. Update the relevant synthesized pages.
3. Link assets and raw notes.
4. Review changes before publishing.
